CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id UInt32, event_time DateTime DEFAULT UTCTimestamp()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
SELECT event_id, event_time, UTCTimestamp() as current_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < UTCTimestamp();
SELECT event_id, (event_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR) as future_time FROM test_dates;
SELECT t1.event_id, t1.event_time, t2.event_time FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_dates AS t2 ON t1.event_id = t2.event_id WHERE t1.event_time < t2.event_time AND t2.event_time = UTCTimestamp();
CREATE TABLE test_events (event_type String, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
INSERT INTO test_events (event_type, event_time) VALUES ('start', UTCTimestamp()), ('end', UTCTimestamp() + INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
SELECT event_type, event_time FROM test_events WHERE event_time BETWEEN UTCTimestamp() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR AND UTCTimestamp();
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_events) AS total_events SELECT total_events, UTCTimestamp() AS query_time;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time = (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_dates) AND event_time <= UTCTimestamp();
SELECT event_id, event_time, UTCTimestamp() - event_time AS time_difference FROM test_dates ORDER BY time_difference DESC;
